name: @fgn/course-enhancer
description: AI enhancement layer for the FGN SCORM toolkit. Takes a CourseManifest and rewrites template-derived prose (course description, briefing HTML, quiz questions) using Anthropic Claude. Additive and idempotent — leaves untouched what it can't improve, and stamps an aiEnhanced marker so downstream tooling can tell. v0 is text-only; cover image generation lands in Phase 1.4.5.
